summary: Code review completed for Gameplay & UI Clarity Updates. All features properly implemented: RPSBidding RevealAnimation shows bid amounts with highlighting for tie scenarios, photo displays show effective value above and original stats below, BattleArena handles 4-4 tie with isTie state, TappingArena PhotoBattleCard shows effective/original values. Browser session persistence issues prevented full UI testing.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: RPSBidding RevealAnimation (lines 160-416) accepts playerBid and opponentBid props and displays them prominently with data-testid='player-bid-display' and 'opponent-bid-display'
VERIFIED: RPSBidding RevealAnimation highlights higher bid with green styling when same RPS choice (sameChoice && playerHasHigherBid)
VERIFIED: RPSBidding photo display (lines 717-903) shows effective value ABOVE photo with data-testid='player-effective-value' and 'opponent-effective-value'
VERIFIED: RPSBidding photo display shows original stats BELOW photo including Base value, Scenery type, Level & Stars, Streak indicators
VERIFIED: BattleArena isTie state declared at line 708: const [isTie, setIsTie] = useState(false)
VERIFIED: BattleArena handleRoundComplete (lines 955-978) detects 4-4 tie and sets isTie=true, gameWinner=null
VERIFIED: BattleArena GameResultScreen (lines 465-498) shows tie-specific UI with 'Tie Game!' title, bets returned message, no unlock/bonus message
VERIFIED: BattleArena handlePlayAgain (line 1032) resets isTie to false
VERIFIED: TappingArena PhotoBattleCard (lines 111-257) shows effective value prominently above photo and original stats below

VERIFIED: All required data-testid attributes present for testing: rps-reveal-animation, player-bid-display, opponent-bid-display, player-effective-value, opponent-effective-value, player-original-stats, opponent-original-stats, tie-result-title, tie-score-display, game-result-screen
context_for_next_testing_agent: All gameplay UI clarity features implemented correctly. Browser automation had session persistence issues preventing full UI testing. Manual testing recommended for: 1) Starting a bot battle and verifying bid amounts display during RPS reveal animation, 2) Verifying effective/original value display on photo cards, 3) Testing 4-4 tie scenario (difficult to automate). Code review confirms all features are properly implemented with correct data-testid attributes.

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real backend implementations
